regionKind.description: How a region is grounded onto the image plane. Covers the representations common in modern CV (detection, instance/panoptic segmentation, keypoints, oriented detection, 3D).

bbox.description: Axis-aligned bounding box in normalized [0,1] coordinates scaled by 1,000,000 (origin top-left; x,y = top-left, w,h = size — COCO-style).

term.description: A reference to a node or edge type declared in an ontology. Either an in-repo ontology term (ontology AT-URI + local id) or an external CURIE/URI.

id.description: Local term id within the ontology, a CURIE (e.g. wd:Q7378), or a URI.

label.description: Human-readable label for the term (e.g. the Wikidata entity label).

rbox.description: Rotated / oriented bounding box (OBB). Center + size in normalized [0,1] scaled by 1,000,000; angleDeg in degrees scaled by 1,000,000 (counter-clockwise).
